name: Pumpkin Bread (from Bobbi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream sugars and butter together until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Mix the flours, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and spices in a separate bowl.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredients and the liquid mix (cider and pumpkin) to the creamed mixture, beating well after each addition.
6. Pour the batter evenly into 2 greased loaf pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
(Note from Bobbi: The recipe usually bakes for about 45 minutes.)
